page_metadata.biotools__summary: A RNA parametric structure webserver that can compute the minimum free energy structure, the partition function Z(k) over all secondary structures having exactly k hairpins, minimum free energy structure and partition function Z(k) over all secondary structures having exactly k multiloops.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A RNA parametric structure webserver that can compute the minimum free energy structure, the partition function Z(k) over all secondary structures having exactly k hairpins, minimum free energy structure and partition function Z(k) over all secondary structures having exactly k multiloops.
